questionHtml: Outline why the ionic radius of K+ is smaller than that of Cl−.
markschemeHtml:
K+ 19 protons AND Cl– 17 protons

OR

K+ has «two» more protons

same number of electrons/isoelectronic «thus pulled closer together»

[2 marks]

meta.title: Outline why the ionic radius of K+ is smaller than that of Cl−.
